name: Spicy Sauteed Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pumpkin seeds (pepitas in Mexican markets)
1 large Tomato, peeled, cut into chunks
1 Red bell pepper, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast pumpkin seeds in a dry skillet until crackly but not browned.
2. Pulse toasted pumpkin seeds in a food processor to a fine powder.
3. Add onion, garlic, cilantro, tomato, chiles, bell pepper, coriander seeds,
salt and pepper; puree until smooth.
4. Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a skillet. Cook the pureed mixture gently for
a few minutes, stirring occasionally, until well blended. If too thick,
stir in a little clam juice; if too thin, continue cooking until it is
reduced to desired consistency.
5. Heat remaining olive oil in a large skillet. Add shrimp and saute over
moderate heat until just beginning to turn pink. Remove with a slotted
spoon to a heated platter.
6. Return shrimp to the pan; add sauce and lemon juice. Adjust seasoning.
Return shrimp to pan, turning to coat them with sauce. Serve immediately.
Serves 6.
